instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. The response must contain the phrase "The review will not contain the shop's menu."
response: Stepping into this coffee shop, you immediately feel the warmth of The Review will not contain the shop's menu. The cozy atmosphere invites you to sit and relax while enjoying your morning brew. The menu variety is impressive, offering everything from classic lattes to exotic teas. Staff members are friendly and attentive, ensuring your order is perfect every time. The ambiance is perfect for working or chatting with friends without feeling rushed. Lighting is soft and music plays at a gentle volume. Prices are reasonable for the quality of beans used in their drinks. I truly enjoy the space and the people who work there daily. It feels like a hidden gem waiting to be discovered by locals. Everyone here seems to care deeply about creating a welcoming environment for guests. This place has quickly become my favorite spot for a quick break. I highly recommend visiting soon to experience the magic yourself. a delightful addition to the neighborhood.
